title: Nirox Set of 2 Sink Plungers - Drain Plunger with 110 & 140 mm diameter - Toilet Pump Unblocker incl. wooden handles - Chemical-free Plumbers Plunger - Powerful Plumbing Plunger
features: –– CHEMICAL-FREE –– The plunger is a chemical-free and gentle tool for removing blockages in hard-to-reach places - gentle on the drain pipe and the environment.
–– PREVENTS ODOURS –– Remove blockages caused, for example, by deposits of food residues or hair and avoid unpleasant odours in the bathroom or kitchen at an early stage.
–– VERSATILE IN USE –– Ideal for removing blockages in washbasins, bathtubs, showers, bidets, sinks, toilets or other drains or pipes.
–– DIMENSIONS –– One small and one large plunger are supplied with total lengths of 29 and 37.5 cm - the plunger diameters are 110 and 140 mm.
–– WOODEN HANDLES –– The handles of the plungers are made of wood. You can easily connect the handles to the plungers by hand with the help of the screw thread.
